query:
SELECT p.id, p.slug, p.name, p.requires_credentials, c.id as conn_id, c.status, c.credentials_encrypted
FROM integration_providers p
LEFT JOIN integration_connections c ON c.provider_id = p.id
WHERE p.slug IN ('sec-edgar', 'finra-brokercheck');
